# Breadcrumb
Hierarchical breadcrumb trail for nested pages and settings.
## Import
```tsx
import { Breadcrumb } from "@/components/ui/breadcrumb";
```
## Usage
```tsx
<Breadcrumb currentPage="Typography" page={undefined} totalPages={undefined} />
```
## Props
- **currentPage** (string) — default: `"Typography"`: Current page
- **page** (number): Page
- **totalPages** (number): Total pages
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx --yes github:Rydaguy101/aurora-ui add breadcrumb
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/breadcrumb
```
